name: Crockpot Pork Chops with Mushroom Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of Mushroom Soup, (12 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the excess fat from the pork chops and use it to grease a large skillet.
2. Over high heat, brown each chop lightly on both sides. Season with salt and pepper as it finishes.
3. Place the seasoned chops in the crockpot.
4. Add sage to the crockpot.
5. In the same skillet, combine the soup (undiluted) and onion flakes.
6. Scrape the pan juices into the cooker.
7. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours.
